raw_consumer_statement: I made a purchase for {$19.00} at a food truck and the merchant added a {$99.00} tip that I didnt authorize. When I contacted my credit card company to tell them I didnt authorize this charge and that it was fraudulent, I was told that it was a face to face transaction and that my word means nothing so they therefore dont consider it fraud and they wont do anything. There was no effort from any of the representatives that I spoke to to actually help, just said it was policy and that because it was in person that automatically means I authorized it even though it was done without my knowledge/fraudulently.
